implemented: cloudflare-static/wrangler.jsonc defines a durable Pages project/output contract
cloudflare-static/verify-deployment.mjs verifies HTTP status, final URL, and three source-identity markers
acceptance_test: node cloudflare-static/verify-deployment.mjs https://<actual-project>.pages.dev exits 0 only when the served page matches the research surface
missing: An authenticated Cloudflare Pages project/deployment or the actual assigned pages.dev hostname
privacy_boundary: No private chat or health material was published. The surface contains only general research-method language.
